question_text: Let рқ‘Ӣ1, рқ‘Ӣ2, вҖҰ , рқ‘Ӣрқ‘ӣ be a random sample of size рқ‘ӣвҒЎ(вүҘ2) from a population having Poisson distribution with mean рқңҶ, where рқңҶ> 0 is an unknown parameter. If рқ‘Ү1 = рқ‘ӢМ…вҒЎвҒЎandвҒЎвҒЎрқ‘Ү2 = вҲҡ рқ‘ӣвҲ’1 вҲ‘ (рқ‘Ӣрқ‘–вҲ’рқ‘ӢМ…)2 рқ‘–=1 , where рқ‘ӢМ… = рқ‘–=1 , then which of the following statements is/are true?

options.A: рқ‘Ү1 is an unbiased estimator of рқңҶ
options.B: рқ‘Ү2 is an unbiased estimator of вҲҡрқңҶ
options.C: 2 is an unbiased estimator of рқңҶ
options.D: Both рқ‘Ү1 and рқ‘Ү2 are estimators of рқңҶ as well as рқңҶ2
